name: cognitive-guardrails
description: A two-skill guardrail package for instruction intake review and final response review.

skills.name: instruction-intake-guardrails
skills.description: Pre-task instruction understanding, authorization boundary, goal drift, risk, blocker, and verification planning guardrails.

skills.name: final-response-guardrails
skills.description: Pre-final delivery review for claims, verification evidence, unfinished work, blockers, uncertainty, and overpromising.
